qualitative_assessment: MP Kamlesh Jangde shows a mixed transparency profile with strong attendance (90%) and a clean criminal record, but significant weaknesses in committee participation, accessibility, and legislative activity. The overall score of 49.5/100 reflects particular concerns around constituent engagement and institutional participation, though the low data confidence (14%) and multiple validation flags suggest incomplete information may be affecting the assessment.
key_finding: Good attendance but poor committee work and accessibility hurt overall score
